## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:run` passes (48+ tests)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials in the diff
- [ ] New features have tests
- [ ] UI changes tested on mobile viewport
